text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back from a long trip out with Taiki
Shuttle...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You—students over there! Stop right where you
are!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: What?! Wait, I know that voice...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm part of the student council! What do you think
you're doing out at this hour—

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, it's just you, Taiki. And who's that with
you?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy, Air Groove! This here's my trainer!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Well, if your trainer's accompanying you, I
suppose there's no issue. I'm sure you asked for
permission before leaving campus.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I apologize for keeping you. With recent reports
of poor behavior occurring off academy grounds,
I have to be especially vigilant.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You may be on your way, but please go straight
back to your dorm. No detours.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I hear ya loud and clear! Why not come back with
me, Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: What? I still have my patrol to attend to...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, so you're makin' the rounds? Then let me join
ya! Don't hog all the fun for yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm not here to have fun, you know. Hey, you're
her trainer—do something about this!
choice_data_list: Let Taiki do what she wants.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
How could you allow this? You
good-for-nothing...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Yay! I'm ready to give it a go! I hate seein' ya toil
away on your lonesome, Air Groove!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So don't ya worry one bit! I'll do the job just how
I'm supposed to. I really mean it—honest!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: All righty, let's get started!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Hey, who put you in charge?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Hey, you there! Stop! Yes, you in the uniform!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Hm, you've already found a student breaking
curfew? I may have misjudged you...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Come join us on patrol!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
What do you think you're doing?! Make her return
to her dorm! Seriously, this is giving me a
headache...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle does the best she can on patrol duty
while Air Groove lectures her.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So you're sayin' that's a no? Well, I get where
you're coming from, with the full moon already
out and all.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Guess we'll be leavin' now, Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Good, go home and get some rest. As for me, I
have my duties to get back to...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... It was nice seein' ya, Air Groove! Shame I couldn't join ya on patrol!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
...If ya wanna change your mind, now's the time!
I'm always down for the cause!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I have no intention of doing anything of the sort,
so go rest! If you're simply looking for an excuse
to play, we can arrange a future date.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I drag a reluctant Taiki Shuttle back to the dorm,
making sure she calls it a day.
